name: Pheasant Wild Rice Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare wild rice according to package directions.
2. Saute onion in butter until tender.
3. Remove from heat; stir in flour until smooth.
4. Drain mushrooms, reserving liquid.
5. Add enough broth to the mushroom liquid to measure 1 1/2 cups.
6. Gradually stir the broth into the flour mixture.
7. Add milk and cook, stirring constantly, until thickened.
8. Stir in rice, mushrooms, pheasant, pimento, parsley, and salt and pepper.
9. Place mixture in a 2-quart casserole dish.
10. Sprinkle with almonds.
11. Bake at 350 degrees for 25-30 minutes.
